ContactForm.title: Contact Me
ContactForm.description1: Need a boost for your next project?
ContactForm.description2: I'm always open to discussing new ideas, collaborations, or ways I can help bring your vision to life.
ContactForm.name: Name

AboutMePage.paragraph1: 👋 Hi there! I'm Zeki, a Software Engineer based in Argentina.
AboutMePage.paragraph2: I'm a passionate frontend developer who enjoys building elegant and functional user experiences. Beyond beautiful UIs, I love solving problems and optimizing products usability.
AboutMePage.paragraph3: I have a solid background in JavaScript and TypeScript, with deep experience in React and its ecosystem, especially Next.js. I've worked with various styling libraries and integrated numerous third-party services, including payment gateways, Google APIs, charts, authentication systems, CMSs, and also with React Native for mobile development.
AboutMePage.paragraph4: I joined the AI bandwagon and I'm excited to explore how this technology can enhance user experience and optimize development processes. In my role as a frontend developer, I've developed and integrated AI APIs to create web agents that can interact with users, answer questions, generate content, and perform specific tasks.
AboutMePage.paragraph5: I'm a problem solver by nature. I love when things work, but I thrive even more when challenges arise—they're opportunities to learn and grow. What do I bring to your team? I'm like a Swiss Army knife: from building UIs from scratch to solving niche bugs or animating components, I adapt and deliver solutions.
AboutMePage.paragraph6: Beyond software engineering, I'm also a math teacher. While studying to become a professor, I discovered my love for problem-solving—which led me into programming. I enjoy teaching, sharing knowledge, and playing chess (not professionally, but often). I’m also into video games—especially strategy, FPS, and sports games.
AboutMePage.paragraph7: I stay active by playing football (soccer), running, cycling, and hitting the gym.
AboutMePage.paragraph8: I'm deeply passionate about astronomy. I love watching documentaries and reading about space. One of my personal goals is to become an astrophotographer and share the beauty of the universe through my lens.
